title: pilosella densiflora subsp. radiocauloides
intro: Pilosella densiflora subsp. radiocauloides is a subspecies of plant in the Rosaceae family, commonly known as a type of sawwort or dandelion relative. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella densiflora subsp. radiocauloides include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
